#1 in Demand

Core Basics

T-shirts, polos, and crewnecks — the highest-volume men's products. Premium cotton, tailored fits, built for repeat orders.

#1 Bestseller SKU: FMC-001

Crew Neck T-Shirt

Heather charcoal, 100% ring-spun cotton, tailored fit, reinforced shoulders, tagless. XS-3XL.

$8-12 MOQ: 50 pcs

V-Neck T-Shirt - Black

Premium cotton jersey, deep V-neck, slim fit, pre-shrunk, side-seamed. XS-3XL.

$8-12 MOQ: 50 pcs

$12-18 MOQ: 50 pcs

Performance Polo - Navy

Lightweight cotton blend, racerback, curved hem, gym-ready. XS-3XL.

Athleisure & Activewear

Built for Brands

Why Men's Clothing from FABRIOZA

★

Premium Fabrics

Ring-spun cotton, French terry, poly-viscose blends. Sourced from certified mills for durability and comfort.

⚒

Tailored Fits

Not baggy, not tight. Modern silhouettes that sell. Slim, regular, and relaxed options per style.

⚡

Fast Production

Samples in 5-7 days. Bulk in 14-21 days. Keep your men's line always in stock and on trend.

📦

Low MOQ

Start with 50 pieces per style. Test multiple SKUs without overcommitting. Scale what sells.

Ready to Launch Your Men's Line?

Get a free quote with sample pricing. Tech packs, size grading, and fabric sourcing included.
